title: Senior Software Engineer - HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd:
HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd!
